data.body: Implemented + pushed as Gerrit change 446 (stacked on 443). Added GOVERNANCE.md (7 sections incl. Nava role + pending-designation succession), MAINTAINERS.md (1-row table + emeritus + change-process), role-based CoC enforcement contact w/ lead-maintainer escape + Nava backstop (stays on CC 2.1; 3.0 deferred), SUPPORT.md CoC line synced to identical hello@navapbc.com, ADR 0038 (3 decisions: lead-maintainer language, CC version, CODEOWNERS non-goal). All ACs grep-verified; lint green. Awaiting LLM-Review +1 / Verified +1.
